archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Light-Theme Glassmorphism with Neon Accents

glassmorphism.input: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-slate-200 focus:border-[#00B4FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00B4FF] text-slate-900

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00B4FF] to-[#FF00A0] text-white font-medium shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(0,180,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(255,0,160,0.4)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-md text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:border-[#00B4FF] hover:text-[#00B4FF] transition-all duration-200

pages_and_routes.name: Home
sections: Hero (with tsparticles 3D background, heading, dual CTAs)

pages_and_routes.name: Quantum Brain
sections: Interactive 5-Layer Diagram (Perception, Memory, Reasoning, Planning, Learning Loop) using nested glass cards and framer-motion

pages_and_routes.name: Industries
sections: Industry Cards (Manufacturing, Logistics, Healthcare, Energy, Enterprise) with hover neon glows and images

pages_and_routes.name: Services
sections: Solutions Grid (AI systems, infrastructure, deployment) using tall glass cards

pages_and_routes.name: Team
sections: Team profiles in frosted glass cards with subtle pink/blue gradient backgrounds

pages_and_routes.name: Contact
sections: Full Inquiry Form (Name, Email, Company, Industry Select, Message) using customized Shadcn inputs with glass effect

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D neural network background, light theme

tech_stack_and_libraries: framer-motion (for scroll reveals, layer architecture animations)
shadcn/ui (for Select, Forms, Inputs - stripped of default Vercel look to match glassmorphism)

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-submit-button')
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over glassmorphic backgrounds meets 4.5:1 ratio. Use Slate-900 for primary text on light glass.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Implement a global sticky Header with glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl) and navigation links. Desktop links must be visible, mobile uses a hamburger menu.
3. Hero Section: Use 'react-tsparticles' to create an interactive, light-themed particle network background that floats behind the main text. Use the provided neon colors for the particles.
4. All Cards MUST follow the 'ui_patterns.glassmorphism.card' rules. No solid white cards.
5. Use Framer Motion to stagger the entrance of the 5 Layers in the Quantum Brain Architecture section.
6. Do not use dark backgrounds for sections. Use #F8FAFC or #F1F5F9 as base, and let the neon gradients provide color via text-clips, buttons, or soft radial background blobs under the glass.
7. The Contact Form must use shadcn form/input components, but you must override their classes to be transparent/glassy with neon focus rings.
8. Since MAH Quantum Logo is 'provided', assume it is placed at `/logo.png` or use a stylized text logo `MAH Quantum`.
